titleStmt.title: SII 25.63: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 63. (A.R. No. 63 of 1908.) VAḺUVŪR, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Brahmapurīśvara temple.

p.hi: Śirigirinātha-uḍaiyār, son of Vijaya Bhūpati-rāyar Śaka 1348 = 1425-26 A.D.

summary.p: This epigraph belongs to the reign period of Bhūpati-uḍaiyar who is in all probability be identical with Vijaya Bhūpatirāyar of another Śirigirinātha-uḍaiyār who is probably identical with Śrīgiri of the Madras Museum Plates (Ep. Ind., Vol. VIII, pp 306 ff). It furnishes the date Śaka 1346 (1424 A.D).
The present record furnishes the details of date viz., Śaka 1348, Viśvāvaśu, Makara śu 13, Monday, Tiruvādirai-nakshatra which regularly correspond to 1426 A.D., January 21.

It records the gift of income from various taxes (āyam) from kaikkōḷar, vāṇiyar, immigrant tenants, paḻavari and puduvari accrued from the vāśal, ubayaṅ-kaṭṭuk-kuttagai of 70 paṇam per year, 10 paṇam for the clothes (puḍavai), chekkupaṭṭai āyam and the amount collected from the market (śandai) for maintaining perpetual lamp to the deity Tiruvayanīśuramuḍaiya-nāyaṇār of Vaḻugūr alias Kali[kaḍinda]śōḻanallūr in Irumbēḍu-nāḍu in Veṇguṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam by Mallarasa[r*]. Mentions ayaṉ Poṟkōyil-uḍaiyār at the end of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīman mahāmaṇṭalicuraṉ Ariyarāya vipāṭan pāṣai
kku tappuvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ muvarāyara kaṇṭaṉ śrīviravicaiya
pūpatirāyar kumāra cirikirināta Uṭaiyaṟku cellāniṉṟa ca(ha)kāt
tam 1000 3 100 4 10 8- Iṉmel cellāniṉṟa vicuvācu varuṣattu
makaranāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapa(k)kṣattu tiṟaiyoteciyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamai
yum peṟṟa tiruvātirai nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇ
ṭalattu veṇkuṉṟak koṭṭattu Irumpeṭunāṭṭu
vaḻukūrāṉa kalikaṭinta coḻanallūr Āḷuṭaiyanāyaṉār
tiruvayaṉicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirumaṭai viḷākattil kaik koḷaṟkum kai
ccai ṟkum vāṇiyar cekkup paṭṭaṭai Āyattukkum ceṉaikka
kum pala paṭṭaṭaiya4 me(l)leṟum (k)kuṭikaḷukkum paṭṭai nūlāyattukkum
kkum peṟku paṭṭai nālāyattu
kku paṭṭai Āyappaṭṭaiccampātam yaccamma nam kuḻi ø-10- m Atikai mātam
maṟṟum Āyattai nokkippa� vaya vācalil piṟakkum paḻavari putuva
ri maṟṟumep peṟppaṭṭa cakala Upāttikaḷumuṭpaṭa Upayaṅkaṭṭuk kuttakai varuṣam Oṉ
ṟukku koḷḷum ø7 10- m puṭavai mutalukku ø10- m Āka ø[8 10]- m cantiṟādhittavaraiyum varu
ṣam varuṣam toṟum celavaṟukka kaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum cekkupaṭṭai Āyam cantai
yil vaṟukiṟa mutaluḷḷatu tiruvayaṉicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilukku tirununtāviḷa
kku Iṭakkaṭavārkaḷ Ākavum Immatikāri cantiṟādhittavaraiyum naṭakkama
llaracar Upaiyam taṉakkeyinta (dha)t tarumattu melkaāttu mel varu piṟatā
ṉarum cukame Irukkaveṇum Eṉṟum dharmattukku kaṭavar kaḷukkey nāyakkar kal
lu veṭṭik kuṭutteṉ Inta kallu veṭṭukku Akutam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkai
karaiyile kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāvam koḷḷak kaṭavarākavum
Ayaṉ poṟkoyiluṭaiyarāyarai cipātattu talaikārkka
Digital edition of SII 25.63 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
